title: Merle
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Merle''' was the younger of two cooks serving on the cruiser ''[[Reliable]]'', part of an Imperial fleet blockading the [[ThonBoka]] nebula. During a game of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], he let slip that the cruiser ''[[Courteous]]'' was in need of supplies and was kicked by the senior cook, [[Clive]].<ref name="Lando">''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1st}}
